upload.title: Upload Images
upload.drag_drop_text_one: Drag and drop an image here

validation.file_too_large: File size {{fileSizeFormatted}} exceeds maximum allowed size of {{maxFileSizeFormatted}}
validation.invalid_file_type: File type {{fileType}} is not allowed. Allowed types: {{allowedTypes}}
validation.invalid_extension: File extension {{extension}} is not allowed. Allowed extensions: {{allowedExtensions}}
validation.max_files_exceeded: Too many files selected. Maximum allowed: {{maxFiles}}

errors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: This file is too large. Please choose a smaller image.
errors.INVALID_MIME_TYPE: This file type is not supported. Please use a JPG, PNG, or HEIC image.
errors.INVALID_EXTENSION: This file type is not supported. Please use a JPG, PNG, or HEIC image.
errors.INVALID_TYPE: This file type is not supported. Please use a JPG, PNG, or HEIC image.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: This file could not be uploaded. Please try a different image.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.PREVIEW_GENERATION_FAILED: Could not preview this image. Please try a different file.
errors.NOT_AN_IMAGE: This file is not an image. Please select an image file.
errors.TOO_MANY_FILES: Too many files selected. Maximum allowed: {{maxFiles}}
errors.SINGLE_FILE_ONLY: Only one image can be uploaded at a time.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: You don't have permission to upload images to this calendar.

accessibility.drag_drop_zone: File upload drag and drop zone
accessibility.image_workspace: Image workspace with focal point adjustment
accessibility.focal_point_marker: Focal point marker. Drag to reposition.

help.drag_drop_instructions: You can drag multiple files at once or click to browse
help.drag_drop_instructions_single: Drag a single file or click to browse

workspace.focal_hint: Drag anywhere to set the focal point
workspace.focal_explanation: The focal point determines how your image is cropped across card and banner displays.
